title: simple magic
description: This Minecraft magic mod introduces entirely new items such as magical zombie entities, magic wands, and magic circles, allowing you to experience something unprecedented in the game.
body:
# 中文

# ✨ SimpleMagic 模组全面指南
一款为**Minecraft**打造的**完整魔法系统模组**，沉浸式解锁魔法、炫酷施法特效、直观操作界面，带你开启专属魔法冒险！

---

## 📜 模组简介
SimpleMagic 是专为 Minecraft 设计的**轻量化+高沉浸魔法模组**，无需复杂配置，一键解锁全新魔法玩法，包含**魔法解锁、技能施法、专属道具、教程引导**全套体系，新手也能快速上手，感受魔法的独特魅力~

---

## 🔮 核心玩法

### 1. 🗝️ 魔法解锁（核心仪式感）
**解锁全流程**：
1. 探索世界，找到村庄中的**📚 图书管理员村民**
2. 对其使用 **Shift+右键** 触发专属交互
3. 跟随对话流程，选择「不知道」选项
4. 观看炫酷魔法解锁动画，**永久获得魔法能力**

**智能判定**：
✅ 仅图书管理员可触发魔法对话
❌ 其他职业村民无响应，保证沉浸体验

### 2. 📊 魔法主界面
**打开方式**：按下 **I 键** 一键开启

**界面核心功能**：
- 🎖️ **魔法等级**：当前等级展示（最高10级，等级越强魔法越厉害）
- 🔮 **魔法值**：当前/最大值+动态进度条，直观查看状态
- 🟢 **技能解锁**：清晰显示已解锁/未解锁魔法技能
- ♻️ **自动恢复**：魔法值**每秒自动恢复1点**，续航无忧

**等级提升**：使用魔法物品、释放魔法技能即可升级

### 3. 🧙‍♂️ 魔法专属物品
#### 🔮 魔法杖（核心施法道具）
- 专属技能：**悬浮魔法**，瞄准生物右键即可施放悬浮效果
- 冷却时间：2秒，平衡不超标
- 特效拉满：释放时**粒子扩散+汇聚特效**+专属魔法音效
- 操作简单：右键瞄准，一键施法

#### 📖 魔法指南书
- 右键直接打开专属界面
- 包含**全套魔法教程+玩法说明**，新手零门槛

#### ✨ 其他魔法道具
- 🔮 **水晶球**：魔法仪式/合成核心材料
- ⭐ **魔法星**：基础魔法素材，合成高级道具必备
- 🪄 **魔法阵**：可放置魔法结构，支持传送/仪式功能

### 4. 📚 魔法新手教程
**解锁魔法后自动开启**，手把手教你玩魔法：
1. 魔法界面操作方法
2. 魔法值恢复规则
3. 等级提升技巧
4. 魔法杖精准使用
5. 全道具功能详解

**操作**：按**空格键**逐页浏览，共13条干货教程

### 5. 🌟 独家特殊功能
#### 🚫 位置锁定
对话期间**强制锁定玩家位置**，不会意外移动，专注体验魔法仪式

#### ✨ 全流程魔法特效
- 解锁魔法：炫酷粒子动画
- 释放技能：华丽视觉特效
- 流程结束：收尾特效展示

#### 🧟 魔法僵尸
专属魔法生物，击败可掉落**稀有魔法材料**

---

## 🛠️ 技术特性
- 🔄 **跨版本兼容**：反射机制适配多版本
- 📡 **服务端同步**：数据实时同步，无异常bug
- 🎯 **高效事件系统**：基于Fabric，交互流畅不卡顿
- 🚀 **性能优化**：特效轻量化，不卡顿游戏
- 🤝 **用户友好**：界面简洁，操作零难度

---

## 🎮 极致游戏体验
1. 🌍 **探索乐趣**：寻找图书管理员，解锁魔法彩蛋
2. 💬 **沉浸对话**：专属剧情流程，魔法解锁超有仪式感
3. 📈 **渐进成长**：从新手到魔法大师，逐步变强
4. 🌈 **视觉盛宴**：精美粒子+特效，施法超炫酷
5. ⚖️ **平衡体系**：魔法值自动恢复，生存模式公平好玩

---

## 🧪 基础合成配方
模组内核心道具均可合成，生存模式轻松获取：
- 🪄 **魔法杖**：专属材料合成
- 🪬 **魔法阵**：基础魔法素材合成
- 🔮 **水晶球**：魔法材料加工合成
- ⭐ **魔法星**：基础掉落/合成素材

---

## 💡 总结
SimpleMagic 是 Minecraft **最适合新手的魔法模组之一**！
从寻找图书管理员解锁魔法，到手持魔法杖释放悬浮术，再通过魔法界面管理能力，**每一步都设计精良、体验拉满**。

轻量化不卡顿、特效炫酷不浮夸、操作简单不复杂，无论你是休闲玩家还是生存大佬，都能在这个魔法世界里找到无限乐趣~

快来开启你的魔法之旅吧！🧙‍♀️

# Engilish

# ✨ SimpleMagic Mod Comprehensive Guide
A **complete magic system mod** built for **Minecraft**, featuring immersive magic unlocking, stunning spell effects, and an intuitive UI to start your exclusive magical adventure!

---

## 📜 Mod Introduction
SimpleMagic is a **lightweight & highly immersive magic mod** designed specifically for Minecraft.
With no complicated setup required, it unlocks a full magic system including **magic unlocking, spell casting, unique items, and guided tutorials**, making it easy for new players to experience the charm of magic.

---

## 🔮 Core Gameplay

### 1. 🗝️ Magic Unlocking (Core Immersive Ritual)
**Full Unlocking Process**:
1. Explore the world and find the **📚 Librarian Villager** in villages
2. Interact using **Shift + Right-Click** to trigger special dialogue
3. Follow the conversation and select the "I don't know" option
4. Watch the cool magic unlocking animation and **permanently gain magic abilities**

**Smart Detection**:
✅ Only Librarians can trigger magic dialogue
❌ Other villager professions do not respond, maintaining immersion

### 2. 📊 Magic Main Interface
**How to Open**: Press the **I Key** to open instantly

**Core Interface Features**:
- 🎖️ **Magic Level**: Displays current level (max level 10; higher level = more powerful magic)
- 🔮 **Mana**: Current / Max mana with dynamic progress bar for clear status
- 🟢 **Skill Unlock Status**: Clearly shows unlocked / locked spells
- ♻️ **Auto Regeneration**: Mana **recovers 1 point per second** for steady sustain

**Level Up**: Use magic items and cast spells to gain experience and level up

### 3. 🧙‍♂️ Exclusive Magic Items
#### 🔮 Magic Wand (Core Casting Item)
- Special Ability: **Levitation Magic** – Right-click to levitate target mobs
- Cooldown: 2 seconds, balanced for survival
- Visual & Audio: **Particle burst + convergence effects** + custom magic sounds
- Simple Control: Aim and right-click to cast

#### 📖 Guide Book of Magic
- Right-click to open a dedicated GUI
- Contains **complete magic tutorials & usage instructions** for beginners

#### ✨ Other Magic Items
- 🔮 **Crystal Ball**: Core material for magic rituals and crafting
- ⭐ **Magic Star**: Basic magic material, essential for high-tier recipes
- 🪄 Magic Circle: Placeable magical structure, supports teleportation and rituals

### 4. 📚 Beginner Magic Tutorial
**Starts automatically after unlocking magic**, step-by-step guidance:
1. How to use the magic interface
2. Mana regeneration rules
3. Level-up methods
4. Precise use of the Magic Wand
5. Full item functionality breakdown

**Control**: Press **Spacebar** to turn pages; includes 13 detailed tips

### 5. 🌟 Exclusive Special Features
#### 🚫 Position Lock
Player position is **force-locked during dialogue** to prevent accidental movement, keeping focus on the ritual

#### ✨ Full Magic Visual Effects
- Magic unlock: Bright particle animations
- Spell casting: Gorgeous visual effects
- Finale: Ending cinematic effects

#### 🧟 Magic Zombie
Unique magic-themed mob that drops **rare magic materials** when defeated

---

## 🛠️ Technical Features
- 🔄 **Cross-Version Compatibility**: Uses reflection for multi-version support
- 📡 **Server-Side Sync**: Real-time data synchronization to avoid bugs
- 🎯 **Efficient Event System**: Built on Fabric for smooth, responsive interactions
- 🚀 **Performance Optimized**: Lightweight particle effects, no lag
- 🤝 **User-Friendly**: Clean UI, simple controls for all players

---

## 🎮 Ultimate Game Experience
1. 🌍 **Exploration Fun**: Search for the Librarian to unlock the magic quest
2. 💬 **Immersive Dialogue**: Custom story-driven process with strong ritual feeling
3. 📈 **Progressive Growth**: Level up from novice to archmage
4. 🌈 **Visual Spectacle**: Beautiful particles and effects for satisfying spellcasting
5. ⚖️ **Balanced System**: Mana auto-regen ensures fair survival gameplay

---

## 🧪 Basic Crafting Recipes
All core items are craftable in survival mode:
- 🪄 **Magic Wand**: Crafted with special materials
- 🪬 **Magic Circle**: Crafted from basic magic materials
- 🔮 **Crystal Ball**: Crafted from magic resources
- ⭐ **Magic Star**: Obtained via drops or basic crafting

---

## 💡 Summary
SimpleMagic is **one of the most beginner-friendly magic mods for Minecraft**!
From finding the Librarian to unlock magic, to wielding the wand to cast Levitation, and managing your powers through the magic interface — **every part is polished and satisfying**.

Lightweight, lag-free, visually impressive without being over-the-top, and simple to control.
Whether you’re a casual player or a survival expert, you’ll find endless fun in this magical world.

Come begin your magical journey today! 🧙‍♀️
